scope: Postmatch reviews for started/completed Groups D, E and F. No local pre-match prediction files were found for these groups, so no hit-rate calculation is reported.

model_rules: raise United States host energy and transition attack
raise Paraguay collapse risk after trailing
raise Australia physical and set-piece floor
downgrade Turkiye defensive transition until repaired
raise Germany attack ceiling and press-to-chance conversion
raise Cote d'Ivoire defensive floor and narrow-win path
downgrade Ecuador chance conversion but keep overall competitiveness alive
raise Sweden aerial and set-piece edge
raise Tunisia collapse risk after trailing

aggregate_note: These groups were missing first-round pre-match predictions, so the postmortem is a calibration baseline rather than prediction accuracy evaluation.
